g.title: emitter
g.text: walshadow CH emitter — parallel pipeline: reorder → decode ×M → batcher → inserter ×N → ack watermark

g.title: cluster_src
g.text: reorder coordinator — single-threaded commit order (pipeline/reorder.rs, inner sink of QueueingRecordSink)

g.title: cluster_ddl
g.text: ordered control barriers — DDL / config / TOAST lifecycle

g.title: cluster_ch
g.text: ClickHouse — main insert pool + DDL + TOAST store connections

g.title: reorder
g.text: put new_rows through sealed row/event cursors

g.title: decode
g.text: detoast: ChunkMap, then store as-of fetch

g.title: ack
g.text: seq done ⇔ placed == acked (rows=0 done at placement)

g.title: ins
g.text: inserter ×N — any idle takes any batch

g.title: apply
g.text: owner TRUNCATE → dest + toast mirror wipe

g.title: legend
g.text: UInt32 — source xid; recovers xact boundary
Bool — 1 on delete; ReplacingMergeTree is_deleted arg unless soft_delete
downstream completes out of order; emitter_ack advances only on the contiguous-done prefix, so slot recycling never outruns CH durability. Retry-exhausted batch = Fatal (never a silent gap)
